items.title: Watch: Trump announces 'major combat operations' in Iran
items.dek: US President Donald Trump accuses the Iranian regime of waging an "unending campaign of bloodshed and mass murder targeting the United States".
items.body: US President Donald Trump accuses the Iranian regime of waging an "unending campaign of bloodshed and mass murder targeting the United States".

items.title: What we know about the joint US-Israel attack on Iran
items.dek: Donald Trump has described "major combat operations", with explosions heard across Iran.
